'''âv-dh-r-ng''' ('''kavadhrengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tiddlywink|tiddlywink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tiddlywink|tiddlywink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-dh-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kavadhrengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivadhrengoko|thivadhrengoko]] || [[word:jivadhrengoko|jivadhrengoko]] || [[word:shivadhrengoko|shivadhrengoko]] || [[word:kivadhrengoko|kivadhrengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvadhrengoko|thuthuvadhrengoko]] || [[word:jujuvadhrengoko|jujuvadhrengoko]] || [[word:shushuvadhrengoko|shushuvadhrengoko]] || [[word:kukuvadhrengoko|kukuvadhrengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvadhrengoko|thĂŠvadhrengoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvadhrengoko|jĂŠvadhrengoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvadhrengoko|shĂŠvadhrengoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvadhrengoko|kĂŠvadhrengoko]]
|-

|-
